description_en: Sydney, in Australia, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.3/5. Muslim travelers will find 83 halal restaurants, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Sydney: 83+ halal restaurants, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.3/5.
